calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matt Xie, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill and Arrow for Plaintiff.
Austin Abernathy, Esq. 949-777-6032 Erskine for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received on this motion only. Defense counsel contests fee amount and timeliness.

ARGUED. Mr. Xie contests and presents arguments.
Mr. Abernathy responds and presents arguments.
Court comments; states timeline.
Court and counsel discuss timeline on fees motion, application of rule of court.
After argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

1 - Plaintiff Heriberto Estrada Magana's Motion for Attorney's Fees, Costs and Expenses is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

2 Orders are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Counsel'S Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Matt Xie, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill and Arrow for Plaintiff.
Austin Abernathy, Esq. 949-777-6032 Erskine for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. This motion is not contestes.

RULING - The matter is not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

2 - Defendant General Motors LLC's motion to strike or tax Plaintiff Heriberto Estrada Magana's counsel's memorandum of costs is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

2 Orders are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Counsel'S Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Continued To Mar-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC.'s Motion To Strike Or Tax Counsel'S Memorandum Of Costs.

Continued on the court's motion to March 4, 2025, to be heard on the same day as the motion for attorney's fees.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
